title: Happy Go Lucky
description: Randomly Teleports (RTP) all players to another location every 5 minutes.
body:
Randomly teleports all players to another location every 5 minutes |  View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features) 

This mod will randomly teleport all the players in the game to another location every 5 minutes. Looking for a new challenge? or want to have some fun with your friends on a sever? then get this mod today!

Slow falling and resistance effects are given after each random teleport.

Also works in the nether and the end.

A world map mod such as Xaero's World Map or JourneyMap is recommended.
